domains.name: AI & LLMs
domains.description: AI models, agents, prompting, model capabilities, and AI policy.

domains.name: Infrastructure
domains.description: Compute, networks, storage, operating systems, deployment, and operational tooling.

domains.name: Knowledge Management
domains.description: Capture, organisation, retrieval, knowledge graphs, and personal knowledge systems.

domains.name: Projects
domains.description: Defined initiatives, project planning, architecture, decisions, and delivery work.

domains.name: Content Creation
domains.description: Writing, video, audio, imagery, publishing, audience development, and creative workflows.

domains.name: Business
domains.description: Markets, companies, products, strategy, finance, regulation, and commercial operations.

domains.name: Personal
domains.description: Personal decisions, home, family, health, relationships, and individual productivity.

domains.name: Gaming
domains.description: Games, gaming hardware, game culture, and the games industry.

domains.name: Philosophy
domains.description: Ideas, ethics, meaning, worldviews, and reflective analysis.

domains.name: Travel & Expat Experience
domains.description: Travel, Thailand, relocation, visas, local life, and expatriate experience.

domains.name: Health & Medicine
domains.description: Health conditions, medicines, treatments, medical research, prevention, and healthcare decisions.

domains.name: Science & Technology
domains.description: Natural sciences, engineering, scientific research, technology, and evidence-based technical explanations outside the AI and infrastructure domains.

domains.name: News & Current Affairs
domains.description: Current events, public affairs, fact-checking, conflicts, elections, policy developments, and general news reporting.

domains.name: History & Society
domains.description: History, politics, culture, social movements, communities, and analysis of society across time.

domains.name: General Reference
domains.description: Useful factual reference material, short lookups, glossaries, explanations, and snippets that do not belong to a more specific domain.

domains.name: Archive
domains.description: Fallback for material that cannot yet be confidently assigned to another domain.
